x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Parts inventory enables Now Assist FSM to check availability before scheduling and recommend optimal stocking.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure stockroom locations and link parts inventory to FSM via alm_stockroom. Target: 5+ active stockroom locations. Now Assist FSM uses parts availability data for AI scheduling optimization.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851caf
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Parts inventory enables Now Assist FSM to check availability before scheduling and recommend optimal stocking.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>FSM Parts Inventory Integration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // alm_stockroom is the OOB stockroom/inventory table for FSM parts
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('alm_stockroom');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active stockroom/inventory locations';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active stockroom locations. Now Assist FSM can optimize scheduling based on parts availability across inventory locations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active stockroom location(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist FSM parts-based scheduling optimization will have limited inventory coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active stockroom locations configured. Now Assist FSM cannot optimize dispatch based on parts availability without inventory data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>FIELD_SERVICE</module>
<number>CHK0006061</number>
<order>90</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure stockroom locations and link parts inventory to FSM via alm_stockroom. Target: 5+ active stockroom locations. Now Assist FSM uses parts availability data for AI scheduling optimization.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851caf</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
